title: brickellia atractyloides var. odontolepis
intro: Brickellia atractyloides var. odontolepis, also known as Mexican brickellia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Mexican brickellia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and soothe digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be made into salves and ointments to be applied topically.
